# AI4AFG

> AI for Afghanistan — an NGO building a brighter future for Afghan communities through AI-powered programs, education, and partnerships.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Mission overview and featured programs.
- [About](/about): Who we are and what we stand for.
- [Our Team](/about/team): The people behind AI4AFG.
- [Partners](/about/partners): Organizations we collaborate with.
- [Donors](/about/donors): Donors supporting our mission.
- [Transparency](/about/transparency): Financials and accountability.
- [Our Work](/work): Programs and initiatives.
- [Get Involved](/get-involved): Ways to support and participate.
- [Partner With Us](/partner-with-us): Partnership opportunities.
- [Donate](/donate): Support our mission.
- [Careers](/careers): Open roles and how to apply.
- [Blog](/blog): Updates, stories, and insights.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch.

## Optional

- [Legal](/legal): Legal information overview.
- [Privacy](/legal/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Imprint](/legal/imprint): Imprint.
- [Disclaimer](/legal/disclaimer): Disclaimer.
